segments.speaker: 题目17/18
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Ben. There are only two weeks before the start of the fall semester, and we'll soon see crowds of students shopping at our bookstore. So I wanted to talk to you about our preparations. Sure. I examined our inventory earlier today, and the good news is that the store is stocked up on everything. That's good to know. Well, I was thinking, I don't like how some of our books are displayed on the sales floor. I'd like to move our best sellers closer to the store entrance. Can you help me with that?
